title: ResourceLedger
description: Resource ledger truth file — tracks in-world resources (items, money, power levels) with opening/closing deltas per chapter. Part of the 7 truth files per REQ-F-14.

version.description: Schema version for future migration support.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this file was last modified.

owner.description: Character ID who owns or controls this resource.

chapter.description: Chapter number for this ledger entry.

openingState.description: Resource state at the start of the chapter (e.g. '1000 spirit stones', 'Golden Core Stage 3').

closingState.description: Resource state at the end of the chapter (e.g. '750 spirit stones', 'Golden Core Stage 4').

delta.description: Change description (e.g. '-250 spirit stones spent on formation materials', '+1 stage breakthrough').

source.description: Source of the change (e.g. 'purchased from merchant', 'breakthrough after battle').

notes.description: Additional context about this resource change.
